data.headline: Rafael Andrade — Investment Advisor
data.tagline: Strategic investments in Miami's luxury market.

items.title: Portfolio Development
items.description: Custom acquisition strategies for residential and commercial investment properties in the Miami metro area.

items.title: Market Intelligence
items.description: Cap rate analysis, rental yield projections, and neighborhood growth forecasts to inform your investment decisions.

items.title: Latin American Investor Services
items.description: Trilingual guidance for Brazilian and Latin American investors navigating the U.S. real estate market.

data.title: Explore Investment Opportunities
data.subtitle: Let's discuss your Miami real estate investment strategy.

data.bio: Rafael Andrade advises investors on luxury residential and commercial real estate opportunities in South Florida. Trilingual in English, Portuguese, and Spanish, he serves a growing Latin American investor clientele. With a background in finance and 10 years in Miami real estate, Rafael identifies opportunities that deliver strong returns.
